Development of Partnership in Collaboration with Conservation Futures Academy

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Development of partnership in collaboration with Conservation Futures Academy (CFA) within LE and with School of Conservation Futures within College of Global Futures. There has been a dozen or so professional education courses that have been offered to the public and the depth of this partnershi...
